'''baruyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaimet|zaimet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaimet|zaimet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| baruyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæriyith|bæriyith]] || [[word:bæriyij|bæriyij]] || [[word:bæriyish|bæriyish]] || [[word:bæriyi|bæriyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:baruruyuth|baruruyuth]] || [[word:baruruyuj|baruruyuj]] || [[word:baruruyush|baruruyush]] || [[word:baruruyu|baruruyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baruyuth|baruyuth]] || [[word:baruyuj|baruyuj]] || [[word:baruyush|baruyush]] || [[word:baruyu|baruyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:barufyuth|barufyuth]] || [[word:barufyuj|barufyuj]] || [[word:barufyush|barufyush]] || [[word:barufyuf|barufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baruyuthu|baruyuthu]] || [[word:baruyuju|baruyuju]] || [[word:baruyushu|baruyushu]] || [[word:baruyuku|baruyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baruyuth|baruyuth]] || [[word:baruyuj|baruyuj]] || [[word:baruyush|baruyush]] || [[word:baruyu|baruyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baruyuthul|baruyuthul]] || [[word:baruyujul|baruyujul]] || [[word:baruyushul|baruyushul]] || [[word:baruyukul|baruyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baruyuthuthu|baruyuthuthu]] || [[word:baruyujuju|baruyujuju]] || [[word:baruyushushu|baruyushushu]] || [[word:baruyuku|baruyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baruyuthun|baruyuthun]] || [[word:baruyujun|baruyujun]] || [[word:baruyushun|baruyushun]] || [[word:baruyukun|baruyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baruyuthuoro|baruyuthuoro]] || [[word:baruyujuoro|baruyujuoro]] || [[word:baruyushuoro|baruyushuoro]] || [[word:baruyukuoro|baruyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
